name: Image Editor — Filters, Layers, Shortcuts, Aspect Ratio

features.label: Advanced Filters (Sharpen, Blur, Vignette, Noise, Grain)
features.desc: Sharpen via convolution matrix, Gaussian blur via CSS filter, radial vignette gradient, random noise, film grain. All with sliders + Apply button.

features.label: Border / Frame Tool
features.desc: Add solid, double, shadow, or polaroid-style border. Configurable thickness and color.
features.howto: Image Editor → Border tool in toolbar

features.label: Layers Panel
features.desc: Text and image overlay items tracked as layers. Toggle visibility, reorder (up/down), set per-layer opacity, delete. Accessible via Layers tab in right panel.

features.label: Aspect Ratio Crop Presets
features.desc: Free, 1:1, 16:9, 4:3, 3:2, 9:16, 2:3, 3:4 presets. Locks crop handles to selected ratio.
features.howto: Image Editor → Crop tool → Aspect Ratio Presets

features.label: Before / After Toggle
features.desc: Press \ or click B/A button to toggle between original and edited image. Badge shows current state.
features.howto: Press \ or click B/A in header

features.label: Keyboard Shortcut Cheatsheet
features.desc: Press ? or click ? button to see all 24 keyboard shortcuts in a modal overlay.
